title: TERMS OF USE

intro.h2: TikControl is not just another tool
bullets: You are in control of your LIVE
TikControl does not make decisions about your TikTok account
You must comply with TikTok's policies
Results depend on how you use the platform
intro.smallText: TikControl is an independent platform. Use of the service is the user's responsibility.

checkbox: I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. IDENTIFICATION
sections.body: This service is operated by TIKCONTROL TECHNOLOGIES S.L., Tax ID: B26633057 (hereinafter, "TikControl").

sections.heading: 2. ACCEPTANCE AND BINDING NATURE
sections.body: By accessing, registering, or using TikControl, the user agrees to be legally bound by these terms. If you do not agree, you must not use the service. TikControl may update these terms at any time. Continued use implies acceptance of any changes.

sections.heading: 3. NATURE OF THE SERVICE
sections.body: TikControl is a technology platform that provides tools for production, control, and management of TikTok LIVE. TikControl is not a monetization platform, does not intermediate payments between users, and does not guarantee results, income, or growth. The user acknowledges that TikControl is an operational support tool.

sections.heading: 4. INDEPENDENCE FROM TIKTOK
sections.body: TikControl is an independent service and is not affiliated with, authorized by, or endorsed by TikTok. TikControl has no control over algorithms, platform policies, moderation, suspensions, or bans. The user assumes full responsibility for their activity on TikTok.

sections.heading: 5. ACCOUNT AND ACCESS
sections.body: Access may be provided through email registration, third-party authentication (e.g. Google), or optional connection to a TikTok account. The user is responsible for keeping credentials secure and for all activity under their account. TikControl may suspend or terminate accounts at any time.

sections.heading: 6. PROHIBITED USE
sections.body: The following is strictly prohibited: illegal or fraudulent use, attempting to breach system security, abusive use of the platform, and unauthorized automation or exploitation. TikControl may take action without prior notice.

sections.heading: 7. USER RESPONSIBILITY
sections.body: The user is solely responsible for content broadcasted, use of the platform, and compliance with TikTok policies and applicable laws. TikControl does not monitor user-generated content.

sections.heading: 8. SERVICE AVAILABILITY
sections.body: TikControl does not guarantee continuous access or error-free operation. The service may be modified, interrupted, or discontinued at any time.

sections.heading: 9. SUBSCRIPTIONS AND PAYMENTS
sections.body: Certain features require a subscription. The user agrees that subscriptions may be recurring, renewal may be automatic, and it is the user's responsibility to cancel before renewal. Payments are processed through third-party providers (e.g. Stripe). TikControl may change pricing with prior notice. In case of failed payment, access to the service may be suspended.

sections.heading: 10. RIGHT OF WITHDRAWAL
sections.body: Where the user qualifies as a consumer, they may exercise the right of withdrawal within 14 days. However, by accessing and using the digital service immediately, the user acknowledges that this right may be waived in accordance with applicable law.

sections.heading: 11. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
sections.body: All elements of TikControl are owned by TIKCONTROL TECHNOLOGIES S.L. The user retains ownership of their content but grants TikControl a limited license to operate the service. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or exploitation is prohibited.

sections.heading: 12. DATA PROTECTION
sections.body: TikControl processes personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws (GDPR). Data is collected to operate the service, improve the platform, and manage the user relationship. For more details, please refer to the Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 13. THIRD-PARTY SERVICES
sections.body: Users may connect external services such as TikTok. TikControl is not responsible for changes in APIs, failures of third-party services, or restrictions imposed by external platforms.

sections.heading: 14. DISCLAIMER AND LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, TikControl shall not be liable for TikTok suspensions or bans, loss of income, direct or indirect damages, or technical errors or service interruptions. Use of the service is at the user's own risk.

sections.heading: 15. GLOBAL LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
sections.body: TikControl's total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the user in the last 30 days.

sections.heading: 16. TERMINATION
sections.body: TikControl may suspend or terminate accounts at any time.

sections.heading: 17. INDEMNIFICATION
sections.body: The user agrees to indemnify TikControl against claims arising from use of the service, generated content, breach of these terms, or violation of third-party rights.

sections.heading: 18. USE BY AGENCIES
sections.body: Agencies are responsible for their creators, their managers, and their operations. TikControl is not part of the relationship between agencies and users.

sections.heading: 19. MINIMUM AGE
sections.body: The user declares they are at least 18 years old or have sufficient legal authorization.

sections.heading: 20. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION
sections.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any disputes shall be subject to the courts of Madrid, Spain.
